title: nervilia taiwaniana
intro: Nervilia taiwaniana, also known as the Taiwan nerine orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to Taiwan. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Nervilia taiwaniana include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Nervilia taiwaniana is typically prepared by drying its roots and leaves, then using them to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
